Home.githubBanner: Diagnose and fix Google Ads from Claude - approval-gated writes, live on GitHub
Home.eyebrow: AI Google Ads strategist + execution layer
Home.headline: Find what's wrong. Fix it from Claude.
Home.subhead: NotFair gives Claude live Google Ads access to diagnose issues, recommend fixes, and execute campaign changes only after you approve.

chat.initialQuestion: Why did leads get more expensive, and what should I fix?
chat.followUpQuestion: Apply the approved negative and keyword changes.
chat.intro: I'll inspect spend, search terms, structure, and recent changes before recommending fixes.
chat.foundSummary: Found 3 issues and drafted a prioritized fix list
chat.finding1: 34% of spend is coming from loose-match queries
chat.finding2: 23 negatives recommended to block mismatched searches
chat.finding3: 4 ad groups should be split before budget increases
chat.permission2: to apply 23 negatives and 80 keyword edits

Home.engineTitle: A Complete Marketing Engine Inside Your Agent
Home.engineBody: Diagnostics, audits, writes, and undo - all driven by one MCP connection per ad account.

faq.q: Will NotFair make changes without my approval?
faq.a: No. NotFair can read your account freely, but every write tool surfaces a diff first. You confirm before anything hits Google Ads - and any change is reversible with a single tool call.

faq.q: Which AI clients does this work with?
faq.a: Anything that speaks the MCP Streamable HTTP transport: Claude.ai (Web, Desktop, Cowork), Claude Code, OpenAI Codex, Cursor, Cline, OpenClaw, Hermes Agent, and custom MCP clients. The server URL is the same - only the per-client config differs.

faq.q: Do I need to know what to fix before I start?
faq.a: No. Lead with the business problem - leads got expensive, ROAS slipped, something changed. The agent diagnoses the likely cause, ranks fixes by spend at risk, and drafts the campaign edits for your approval.

faq.q: What can the agent actually change?
faq.a: Keywords, negatives, bids, budgets, ads, ad groups, campaign settings, audiences, scripts, and reporting workflows - all on Google Ads. Every write is approval-gated and logged.

OAuth 2.0 with PKCE by default - Claude.ai and Codex run it automatically. For clients that don't support OAuth, generate a Bearer token at notfair.co/connect. Either way, NotFair never asks an LLM to handle credentials directly.

Yes. Connecting and running audits is free, no credit card. The Free plan includes 7 days of unlimited access, then 300 MCP operations per month forever. Upgrade to Growth when Claude becomes your daily ads operator.

Connect.headline: Connect your Google Ads account
Connect.body: Sign in with Google so NotFair can find your ad accounts and prepare your MCP setup.
Connect.oauthNote: OAuth keeps your credentials out of the AI client.
Connect.demoIntro: Want to see the product first? Open a read-only demo workspace.
Connect.demoNote: Demo data is synthetic and safe to click through.
Connect.demoFailed: Could not start demo mode. Please try again.

error.scopeBody: NotFair cannot read your campaigns or make changes without the Google Ads permission. When you continue, keep that permission checked on Google's consent screen.
error.scopeHelper: Look for the checkbox labelled "See, edit, create, and delete your Google Ads accounts and data." If you uncheck it, NotFair cannot see your campaigns.
error.scopeCta: Continue and allow Google Ads access
error.genericHeadline: We could not finish connecting your account
error.genericBody: Something went wrong on our end. Please try again. If it keeps failing, reach out and we can help.
